sections.paragraph:
verb הורע

to worsen, become worse; deteriorate

verb להרע

to worsen, make worse

verb להרע

to harm, hurt, do evil, do wrong, ill-treat

verb להריע

to shout (with joy, triumph) , cheer; trumpet

masculine noun and adjective

bad, wrong, ill, lousy, foul, moldy, mouldy, noxious, unkind, verminous, atrocious; evil, wicked, vicious, meany, nefarious, baleful; dangerous, malignant

masculine noun

badness, wickedness, evil; trouble, calamity

noun

friend, companion, comrade; fellow-creature

masculine noun

idea, thought
